# The Social 99
> Affordable Social Media Management for Small Business — Customized Content, Expert Management, Proven Results.

The Social 99 is a social media management agency that helps small businesses grow their online presence through consistent, high-quality content. Trusted by 1,450+ businesses, we offer done-for-you social media management, short-form video creation, and website design — all starting at $99/month.

## Services

- [Social Media Management](https://thesocial99.com/social-media-management): Full-service social media management including content creation, scheduling, and strategy for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and more.
- [Short-Form Videos](https://thesocial99.com/short-form-videos): Professionally produced Reels, TikToks, and short-form videos designed for virality and engagement.
- [Website Design](https://thesocial99.com/services/website): Conversion-focused website design with seamless UX and ROI-backed results.
- [Pricing](https://thesocial99.com/pricing): All plans start at $99/month with no setup fees, no contracts, cancel anytime.
- [Book a Call](https://thesocial99.com/book-a-call): Free consultation call to discuss your social media goals.

## Industry Niches

- [Pet & Grooming](https://thesocial99.com/pet-and-grooming)
- [Med Spa](https://thesocial99.com/med-spa)
- [Salons & Beauty](https://thesocial99.com/salons-and-beauty)
- [Restaurants](https://thesocial99.com/restaurants)
- [Bars](https://thesocial99.com/bars)

## Company Info

- [About Us](https://thesocial99.com/about): Learn about The Social 99 team and our mission.
- [Our Work](https://thesocial99.com/work): Portfolio and examples of our social media content.
- [Blogs](https://thesocial99.com/blogs): Social media tips, strategy guides, and industry insights.
- [Careers](https://thesocial99.com/careers): Join The Social 99 team.

## Key Facts

- Founded to make professional social media management accessible to small businesses
- Serves 1,450+ businesses across multiple industries
- Plans start at $99/month — no long-term contracts, cancel anytime
- 7-day money-back guarantee
- Platforms supported: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and more
- Content is 100% custom — no recycled templates
